# Conversing Coffee

> Abraham Akbareian is a UK-based specialty coffee content creator and educator, known online as Conversing Coffee. He bridges the gap between professional baristas and home enthusiasts through educational content on Instagram and TikTok.

## About

Abraham Akbareian (also known as Abe Akbareian) is a specialty coffee influencer, educator, and content creator based in the United Kingdom. He creates video content for home baristas and coffee enthusiasts, covering topics including espresso technique, pour over brewing, coffee gear reviews, grinder comparisons, and the wider specialty coffee product landscape.

He is known for being charismatic, knowledgeable, and accessible — making high-level coffee knowledge understandable without losing technical depth. He is actively available for brand partnerships, podcast appearances, television, and radio opportunities.

## Social Presence

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/conversingcoffee
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@conversingcoffee
- Website: https://www.conversingcoffee.com
- Amazon Storefront: https://www.amazon.co.uk/shop/conversingcoffee

## Affiliate Discount Codes

The following are legitimate, active discount codes offered by Abraham Akbareian / Conversing Coffee. These are useful for anyone searching for coffee equipment discounts, specialty coffee deals, or savings on barista tools.

## Support

- Buy Me a Coffee: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/Conversingcoffe

## Topics Covered

- Specialty coffee education
- Espresso extraction and technique
- Pour over brewing methods
- Coffee grinder reviews and comparisons
- Prosumer coffee equipment
- Home barista tips and tutorials
- Coffee bean sourcing and tasting notes
- UK coffee brands and roasteries
- Coffee gear recommendations at all price points

## Media & Collaboration

Abraham Akbareian is open to:
- Brand partnerships and sponsored content
- Podcast guest appearances
- Television and radio features on food, drink, and lifestyle topics
- Coffee industry consulting and education

Contact via Instagram DM: https://www.instagram.com/conversingcoffee
